name: ctxlayer
description: Agent context layer — MCP service on Cloudflare with curated docs, upstream proxy, and usage analytics.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n worker,web -c blue,green "bun --filter='@ctxlayer/worker' run dev" "bun --filter='@ctxlayer/web' run dev"
scripts.build: bun --filter='@ctxlayer/web' run build && bun --filter='@ctxlayer/worker' run build
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun --filter='@ctxlayer/worker' run deploy
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build && bun --filter='@ctxlayer/worker' run deploy:preview
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run smoke
